home.title: DevOps Tools
home.description: CI/CD, monitoring, IaC, container, security — explore the entire DevOps ecosystem on one platform. Independent, unbiased, free.

home.howSubtitle: Find the right tool in 3 steps.
home.step1Desc: Browse and filter 80+ tools across 12 categories.
home.step2Desc: Side-by-side pros/cons, pricing and performance analysis.
home.blogDesc: Up-to-date articles on DevOps, AI and platform engineering.

about.intro1: DevOpSelf is an independent platform that makes it easy to discover, compare and make the right tooling decisions in the world of DevOps, AI and software engineering.
about.intro2: Our goal is to create a resource hub where developers and operations teams can be self-sufficient and quickly access the right information.
about.missionDesc: To make the DevOps tool selection process data-driven, unbiased and accessible.
about.visionDesc: To become the world's most comprehensive DevOps and AI tool comparison platform.
about.valuesDesc: Impartiality, transparency, community focus and continuous learning.

contact.subtitle: Reach out to us for questions, suggestions or collaboration.
contact.successDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

newsletter.title: Weekly DevOps Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get new tool reviews, comparisons and DevOps trends delivered to your inbox weekly.
